data.title: Erasca plans $150M public stock offering on Nasdaq (ERAS), also granting underwriters option for additional $22.5M shares.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Erasca, Inc. (Nasdaq: ERAS), a company specializing in precision oncology for RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers, announced plans for a public offering. They aim to offer $150.0 million in shares of common stock, with the potential for an additional $22.5 million through the underwriters. The completion and final terms of the offering are subject to market conditions.

data.title: Corvus Pharmaceuticals plans to offer $150 million of common stock and pre-funded warrants in a public offering.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRVS), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, announced the initiation of an underwritten public offering. The offering consists of $150,000,000 in shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants to acquire shares of common stock for certain investors. Corvus will be offering all the shares and warrants in the deal. Additionally, the company plans to give underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an extra $22,500,000 in common stock at the public offering price before discounts and commissions. The completion of the offering depends on market conditions and other factors, making it uncertain if or when it will be finalized, along with the final size and terms of the offering.

data.title: RB Global (NYSE: RBA, TSX: RBA) to release Q4, 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026, followed by a conference call at 4:30pm ET.
data.description: RB Global, Inc. (NYSE: RBA) (TSX: RBA) disclosed it will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on February 17, 2026. Following this announcement, the company is set to conduct a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time on the same day to delve into the results. For interested analysts and institutional investors, prior registration is available to join the conference call through the provided link: https://events.q4inc.com/analyst/991675578?pwd=s7B00vZU.

data.title: Roots partners with Metro Supply Chain for 10 years, moving distribution to Ontario facility, boosting efficiency.
data.description: In Toronto, Roots (TSX: ROOT) disclosed a 10-year strategic collaboration with Canadian logistics partner Metro Supply Chain. The move entails transferring Roots distribution operations from their current facility to Metro's Ontario location. Metro Supply Chain, a top privately-owned logistics provider in Canada, delivers comprehensive, data-oriented supply chain services. This new partnership signals a significant shift for Roots and is poised to enhance their distribution operations fundamentally.

data.title: MANSCAPED® launches The Lawn Mower® 5.0 Ultra Desert Sand, a refined groin and body hair trimmer in neutral color.
data.description: SAN DIEGO – MANSCAPED®, a leading men’s grooming company, has introduced The Lawn Mower® 5.0 Ultra Desert Sand. This latest version of the popular groin and body hair trimmer offers advanced features and improved performance in a sleek neutral color, exuding sophistication and confidence. The product aims to make grooming below the belt less daunting. MANSCAPED® continues to innovate, catering to its global consumer base with this updated offering.

data.title: Upwork (Nasdaq: UPWK) will report Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 9, 2026, after market close. Q&A call at 2pm PT.
data.description: Palo Alto-based Upwork Inc. (Nasdaq: UPWK) disclosed plans to unveil their financial performance for Q4 and full year of 2025 on February 9, 2026, after the market closure. The report will be followed by a Q&A conference call scheduled for 2:00 p.m. PT (5:00 p.m. ET) on the same day. Upwork is a leading global platform connecting freelancers and employers, utilizing both human expertise and AI technology.

data.title: Power & Infrastructure Split Corp. initiates an equity program to raise funds without specifics on amount to be raised.
data.description: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has reached 5.2%, which is a slight increase from the previous month. It was also informed that the GDP growth for the last quarter was 2.6%, exceeding expectations and showing positive signs for the economy. Additionally, the stock market experienced a slight dip, with the main index falling by 1.5% to 10,500 points. These economic indicators reveal a complex situation with some sectors showing growth while others are experiencing challenges. Experts are closely monitoring the situation to assess the overall health of the economy and predict future trends.

data.title: Headlines about data should be approached with skepticism as they can manipulate context. Home sales up 0.1%, but with margin of error at 90% confidence interval suggesting growth could be as much as 14.3% or -14.2%. Story framing is important to consider.
data.description: The article discusses the importance of critically analyzing news headlines, specifically focusing on two contrasting headlines about US new home sales data released last week. One headline from Reuters stated "US new home sales fall marginally in October," while another from the Wall Street Journal said "U.S. New Home Sales Pick Up After Summer, Delayed Data Say." Both headlines are factually accurate based on the data but showcase how different tones can be created by altering the context. The article highlights the margin of error in the Census's new home sales figures, derived from surveys, leading to reported figures being extrapolated from a sample and coming with a margin of error at a 90% confidence interval. This means that while new home sales reportedly increased by 0.1% in October, actual new home sales may have grown by as much as 14.3% or decreased by as much as 14.2% from the previous month. The base number is also subject to revision. The key takeaway is to approach news headlines with skepticism and consider the margin of error in data interpretations.

data.title: Foster Wallace Personal Injury Lawyers pledges $36,000 to Kansas City nonprofits through "12 Months of Giving" initiative.
data.description: A law firm in Kansas City has pledged to donate a total of $36,000 to support local nonprofits through monthly contributions and recognition efforts. The firm, Foster Wallace Personal Injury Lawyers, based in KANSAS CITY, Mo., made this commitment after their 12 Days of Giving campaign received significant positive feedback. The initiative includes regular donations along with highlighting the work of various nonprofits throughout the community.

data.title: Investigation into ZoomInfo Technologies by Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC. Examining officers & directors. (words: 80)
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti Jr., Esq., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed the initiation of an investigation by KSF into ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc. (NasdaqGS: GTM) in New York and New Orleans. This investigation will focus on undisclosed information related to ZoomInfo Technologies, Inc., with particular attention to potential irregularities.

data.description: Correction: A previous version of this announcement was mistakenly released. This updated press release replaces all previous versions and provides accurate and comprehensive information from the company. The commercial launch of VitaSmart is anticipated in the first quarter of 2026. The labeling has received FDA clearance, endorsing its widespread use.

data.title: Global organizations are entering a new reality of AI-driven decision-making, where human actions shape algorithms. Importantly support human-led values for AI success.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, global organizations are increasingly relying on AI for decision-making, leading to a shift in focus. They are not only creating AI systems for humans, but are now also shaping humans to fit into a machine-driven world. Everyday behaviors, leadership choices, and societal standards are becoming essential training inputs and models for algorithms. In this AI-dominated landscape, it is crucial to emphasize the significance of human involvement. Those who successfully integrate values and economic worth into AI development are likely to emerge as the frontrunners in this evolving environment.
